dept_gba_corporation_desc: GBA is split into 5 city corporations, each responsible for civic administration within their respective area.
dept_gba_zone_desc: Administrative zones within each GBA Corporation, each Corporation consists of 2 Zones.
dept_gba_division_desc: Divisions are subunits of GBA Zones.
dept_gba_subdivision_desc: Subdivisions are subunits of GBA Divisions.
dept_gba_ward_desc: The basic unit of local administration and represented by elected corporators.
dept_bbmp_wards_desc: Ward boundaries in place between 2023 and 2025. The basic unit of local administration and represented by elected corporators.
dept_bbmp_wards_old_desc: Ward boundaries in place before 2023. The basic unit of local administration and represented by elected corporators.
dept_bescom_division_desc: Divisions are the largest administrative unit in BESCOM.
dept_bescom_subdivision_desc: Subdivisions are the middle adminstrative unit in BESCOM.
dept_bescom_section_desc: Sections are the smallest administrative unit in BESCOM.
dept_bwssb_division_desc: Divisions are the largest administrative unit in BWSSB.
dept_bwssb_subdivision_desc: Subdivisions are the middle administrative unit in BWSSB.
dept_bwssb_service_station_desc: Service stations are the smallest administrative unit in BWSSB.
dept_police_city_desc: Bengaluru City Police jurisdictions for law and order.
dept_police_traffic_desc: Bengaluru Traffic Police jurisdictions for traffic management and enforcement.
dept_bda_desc: Bangalore Development Authority zones for urban planning, development, and layout approval.
dept_admin_district_desc: Districts headed by Deputy Commissioners for general administration.
dept_admin_taluk_desc: Taluks headed by Tahsildars for revenue collection and land administration.
dept_admin_hobli_desc: Hoblis are sub-divisions of taluks, each comprising a group of villages for revenue administration.
dept_admin_village_desc: Revenue villages are the smallest administrative unit for land records and revenue collection.
dept_election_pc_desc: Parliamentary constituencies electing Members of Parliament to the Lok Sabha.
dept_election_ac_desc: Assembly constituencies electing Members of Legislative Assembly to the Karnataka Vidhan Soudha.
dept_pincode_desc: Postal PIN code areas served by India Post offices.
dept_stamps_dro_desc: District Registrar Office jurisdictions for property registration and stamp duties.
dept_stamps_sro_desc: Sub-Registrar Office jurisdictions for local property registration.
